changesValidated.summary: DURATION scale exported, buffer transitions added
Segment tokens, spacing scale, animation timing, easing functions added
Hardcoded colors replaced with CSS variable references
Timing rationale documented, audio gaps identified for TTS generation

changes: Segment colors now visually distinguish each show
Buffer transitions smooth emotional intensity shifts
Duration scale provides consistent animation feel

issues.description: Production build has pre-existing @utility nesting error in Tailwind v4
issues.recommendation: Address separately from design coherence work

issues.description: Audio gaps (intro-instructions, shark-reason, post-credits) require TTS generation
issues.recommendation: Use ElevenLabs or human recording as per project constraints

preExistingFailures: test/screen-arc.test.ts - outdated screen order expectations (3 tests)
result.summary: All 4 focus areas addressed. 103/109 tests pass (6 pre-existing failures). TypeScript compiles clean. CSS tokens centralized, transitions harmonized, segment identity established.
